dashboard.loading-banner-message: Please wait for the page to finish loading. Theme buttons will work once the dashboard has loaded.
dashboard.integration-button-if-not-working-info: If the theme buttons above don't work, refresh the page to load theme data (e.g. switch away and back to Dashboard, or reload the app).
dashboard.enable-app-title: Enable the app from your store
dashboard.enable-app-info: Enable the app to start using its features.
dashboard.enable-app-integration-info: The app will not appear for customers until you enable it in your store. Go to Theme Editor → Customize → App blocks → Quick Cart  and turn the block on.
dashboard.enable-app-integration-button: Open selected theme in Theme Editor
dashboard.enable-app-integration-button-text: Open live theme in Theme Editor
dashboard.progressbar1-block-info: Create a discount progress bar based on the price range of the cart total. (IMPORTANT : Create Disount as per the Price Ranges in Shopify Discounts)
dashboard.progressbar2-block-title: Buy X Get Y Discount Progress Bar
dashboard.progressbar2-block-info: Create a discount progress bar based on the buy and get quantities. (IMPORTANT : Create Disount as per the Buy and Get Quantities in Shopify Discounts)
dashboard.block-upsell-info: Select the collection for upsell products in the cart drawer. (IMPORTANT : Collection should be in the shopify)
dashboard.block-Mystrybox-info: a Mystery box product that will be added to the cart drawer. (IMPORTANT : Product should be in the shopify)
dashboard.block-thirdparty-integration-info: Append Third Party Checkout Integration Code in the cart drawer. (IMPORTANT : Code should be in the shopify)
dashboard.block-announcementbar-info: Create Announcement Bar carousel in the cart drawer. Add multiple announcements slide by seprated (,) to the carousel.
dashboard.block-countdown-info: Setup Countdown Timer in the cart drawer. (CountDown Timer refresh automatically After a day)
dashboard.block-freegift-info: Gift Product Automatically Added to cart when the cart total exceeds the set price (IMPORTANT : Gift Product Price same as updated in shopify)
dashboard.help-info: If you have any questions or encounter errors while using this app, email

settings.main-message: Update Milestones to see the progress bar (IMPORTANT : Create Disount as per the Milestones in Shopify Discounts)
settings.create-discount-info-text: Create discount in your store for the working of this progress bar as per the milestones you set above. For example, if you set milestone 1 as 1000, create a discount in Shopify with minimum requirement of 1000. Similarly, create discounts for other milestones as well.
settings.info-baner: Discount applied at order value previous saved configuration

freeproduct.important-text: This rule will give free product to the customer when they buy the selected products.

progressbaron1.page-title: Buy X Get Y Progress Bar
progressbaron1.main-message: Update Buy Quantity and Get Quantity to see the progress bar (IMPORTANT : Create Disount as per the Buy Quantity and Get Quantity in Shopify Discounts)
progressbaron1.create-discount-text: Create discount in your store for the working of this Progress Bar
progressbaron1.saved-config-banner: Buy X Get Y Saved Configuration
progressbaron1.set-buy-quantity-message: Set Buy quantity to start the preview
progressbaron1.offer-unlocked-message: Offer unlocked! B{{buy}}G{{get}} applied at checkout
progressbaron1.remaining-one-message: Add 1 more item to unlock B{{buy}}G{{get}}
progressbaron1.remaining-many-message: Add {{remaining}} more item(s) to unlock B{{buy}}G{{get}}
progressbaron1.invalid-quantity-message: Buy and Get must be numbers >= 1.

helpPage.banner-text-prefix: If you have any questions or encounter errors while using this app, email
helpPage.description-placeholder: Describe the issue. You can attach screenshots by replying to our confirmation email ({{target}}).
helpPage.modal-message-prefix: Thanks for reaching out! Our support team will get back to you within
helpPage.urgent-message-prefix: If your issue is urgent, email

settingsPage.enable-countdown-info: Enable Countdown Block in Cart Drawer
settingsPage.countdown-chip-background-info: Background Color for Countdown Timer Blocks
settingsPage.countdown-chip-text-info: Text Color for Countdown Timer Blocks
settingsPage.cart-background-info: Background Color for Cart Drawer Body
settingsPage.cart-text-info: Text Color for Cart Drawer Body
settingsPage.cart-border-radius-info: Border Radius for Cart Drawer Body Button and Checkout Button
settingsPage.button-text-color-info: Text Color for Cart Drawer Buttons and Checkout Button
settingsPage.button-background-info: Background Color for Cart Drawer Buttons and Checkout Button
settingsPage.button-border-radius-info: Border Radius for Cart Drawer Buttons and Checkout Button
settingsPage.enable-announcement-info: Enable Announcement Bar Block in Cart Drawer
settingsPage.announcement-content-info: Update Announcement Bar Content By comma-separated values (Example: Free shipping order above 999, Get 10% Off order above 1999)
settingsPage.enable-collection-info: Enable Block Upsell Products in Cart Drawer
settingsPage.select-collection-info: Select Collection for Upsell Products in Cart Drawer
settingsPage.enable-product-info: Enable Block Free Gift Product in Cart Drawer (Important: Product should be in the cart to show the free gift product)
settingsPage.search-product-info: Search and Select Product for Free Gift Product in Cart Drawer (IMPORTANT : The free gift will appear in the cart drawer only after the selected product is added to the cart. The gift price is automatically taken from the product price set in Shopify.)
settingsPage.enable-product-selection-warning: Enable product selection above to select products
settingsPage.enable-third-party-info: Enable Third-Party Integration in Cart Drawer
settingsPage.third-party-code-info: Paste your third-party checkout integration code here

giftproductPage.minimum-price-label: Set Order Minimum Price to Enable Gift Product
giftproductPage.price-info: Update the price here once the total price of the product added to the cart exceeds the set price.
giftproductPage.zero-price-info: Also make sure the price of this product is set to 0 from the Shopify dashboard. The product will be added as a free gift, so you need to manually set the price of this product from Shopify to 0.
giftproductPage.select-product-info: Select the product to gift from the list of products.
